prompt:
Subject: Rainy day

Person/Expression: woman in her early 20s, loose black side ponytail, thin bangs, clear natural skin, natural makeup, calm expression with downcast eyes, quiet and elegant atmosphere.

Clothing/Pose: dark blue Japanese-style loungewear, subtle floral embroidery, relaxed fit with waist tie, sitting on tatami by the window, natural pose looking slightly down with one hand on the floor.

Background/Lighting: large window with raindrops, blurry garden greenery outside, Japanese room with tatami and shoji, calm inn-like interior, soft natural light of a rainy day, moist and quiet ambiance.

Composition/Camera: vertical composition, portrait from upper body to above knees, person placed to the right, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural photography with softly blurred raindrops on the window and background.

Texture/Style: high definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture, realistic AI portrait, Japanese-style portrait, soft tones, rainy day transparency, cinematic lighting, elegant and quiet inn photography style.

Negative: low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, warped body, excessive processing, overexposure, broken clothes, text, logo, watermark
